parsed.production_notes: The video features human actors in real-world settings, with no discernible AI-generated elements in their appearance, movements, or the environment. The AI avatar within the phone screen is clearly presented as an in-app feature.

characters.appearance: A young adult woman with a slender build and medium complexion. She has long, straight dark hair that reaches her waist, styled with a side part. Her facial features are expressive, with dark eyes and a confident smile.
characters.wardrobe: An olive green kurta with a subtle, light-colored block print pattern. The kurta has three-quarter sleeves and side slits, worn over dark trousers.
characters.demeanor: Initially confident and assertive, then friendly and enthusiastic when explaining.

characters.appearance: A young adult man of average build with a medium complexion. He has short, curly dark hair and light stubble. He wears clear-framed glasses, giving him an intellectual look.
characters.wardrobe: A black collared shirt with long sleeves, worn untucked, paired with dark blue trousers.
characters.demeanor: Observant and initially skeptical, transitioning to surprised and curious.

characters.appearance: A young adult man of average build with a medium complexion. He has short, curly dark hair and light stubble. His facial features are soft, and he has a friendly expression.
characters.wardrobe: A light grey or off-white collared shirt, open at the neck, with short sleeves.
characters.demeanor: Observant and initially skeptical, transitioning to surprised and curious.

characters.appearance: A young adult woman with a fair complexion and long, wavy dark hair styled over one shoulder. She has a friendly and approachable face with expressive eyes and a warm smile.
characters.wardrobe: A bright pink saree with a subtle gold border, accessorized with simple gold earrings.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and professional, as if speaking directly to a learner.

scenes.setting: Outdoor paved area, possibly a college campus or public space, with a light-colored building, a green auto-rickshaw, and trash bins in the background. Daytime, bright and clear.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, over-shoulder perspective from behind Character B and Character C, focusing on Character A.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman (Character A) with long dark hair stands confidently in the center, facing two young men (Character B and Character C) whose backs are partially visible in the foreground. She wears an olive green kurta with a subtle pattern. Her right hand is raised, index finger pointing slightly upwards, as if making a point. The background features a paved outdoor area with a light-colored building, a green auto-rickshaw with a driver inside, and two trash bins (one yellow, one green) to the right. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: A young woman (Character A) stands confidently, addressing two young men (Character B and Character C) who are seated with their backs to the camera. She is making a point with her hand. Subtitles in Malayalam and English are present at the bottom of the screen, translating her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ഇപ്പൊ ചിരിക്കാ? ഇപ്പൊ എന്നെ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് അറിയാന്ന് കളിയാക്കി ചിരിക്കണമാടാ? [Now laugh? Now you want to mock me for knowing English?]
Character A says: It's only been 15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys.
scenes.on_screen_text:
ippol English edan na (Malayalam)
kalakki chirikkanamada, (Malayalam)
15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys. (English)

scenes.setting: Outdoor green area with a low concrete wall, lush trees, and a blue swimming pool visible in the background. Daytime, bright and sunny.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, over-shoulder perspective from behind Character A, focusing on Character B and Character C.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two young men (Character B and Character C) stand and sit respectively, facing a young woman (Character A) whose back is partially visible in the foreground. Character B, wearing a black shirt and glasses, stands with hands in pockets, looking surprised. Character C, in a light grey shirt, sits on a low wall, also looking surprised. Behind them is a lush green area with trees, a blue swimming pool, and a red and white caution tape. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: Two young men (Character B and Character C) react with surprise to the young woman (Character A) who is partially visible from the back. Character B stands, Character C sits on a low wall. Subtitles in English and Malayalam are present at the bottom of the screen, showing their reactions.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Just 15 days?
Character C says: Wow, very fluent English!
Character B says: അത് ഏതാ ആപ്പാണ് ബ്രോ? [Which app is that, bro?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Just 15 days? (English)
Wow, very fluent English! (English)
Adhe enna aap pannuradhu? (Malayalam)

Inside the phone screen, a young woman (Character D) with long wavy dark hair and fair complexion is shown from the chest up, speaking directly to the viewer. She wears a bright pink saree with a gold border and simple gold earrings. Her expression is friendly and engaging. The app's logo 'SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE' is visible at the top of the screen. The background outside the phone is blurred. Subtitles in Malayalam are present at the bottom of the screen.
